[15/12/2024, 11:33:45 PM] Michael Mitry: In Isaiah 30:21, God is speaking to the people of Israel through the prophet Isaiah. The “voice” referred to symbolizes God’s guidance, either directly or through His Spirit, reassuring the Israelites that He will guide them on the right path if they listen to Him.

The message is intended to comfort and encourage the Israelites, who had strayed from God’s ways but were being called back to trust in Him rather than relying on their own plans or alliances, such as with Egypt. It’s a reminder that God is always ready to lead His people when they turn to Him.
